steps.title: Interpret the input
steps.content: The function gives the predicted value of the vase $x$ years after Sonia purchased it. Therefore, $x=6$ means $6$ years after Sonia purchased the vase.

steps.title: Interpret the output
steps.content: The value $f(6)$ is approximately $89$, so the predicted value is approximately $89$ dollars when $x=6$. The statement describes the vase's predicted value $6$ years after purchase. The answer is D.
